seoTitle: Clemton Park vs Cleveland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clemton Park and Cleveland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clemton Park vs Cleveland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clemton Park and Cleveland.
heading: Clemton Park vs Cleveland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clemton Park, New South Wales and Cleveland, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clemton Park has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Cleveland (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clemton Park or Cleveland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clemton Park has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Cleveland scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clemton Park scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Cleveland scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clemton Park or Cleveland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clemton Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
